item.title: Just a tuesday meme dump
item.description:
I’m gonna start doing this
Life goals, especially the bag that’s bigger on the inside
Just dreaming of summer and sundresses right now
Very comfortably
Never took a computer science class when I was in school but spend most days programming
Feeling stronger emotions and being able to cry easier has been liberating
:3
My internal monologue
That is all. I hope you have a terrific Tuesday ❤️
item.dc:creator: secretlyacd

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
a top notch meme format imo
that's metal af
damn ok
why do you think people like pizza so much? the delicious taste?
23 or 25 foot simply won't do
was on the phone with them for a half hour just to get service cancelled
practical
is that a turkey?
not really how i pictured it
as is tradition
wait what
much big
mmm hmm
ok
make me
this sucks bc i have a bunch of it (clown money)
that's my time.. have a great night, gang!!

item.title: Sissy SpaceX reportedly under federal review for undisclosed meetings with foreign leaders
item.description: Yeah I know, shocking right? Several employees allege that Musk and his company ducked and dodged reporting requirements to protect sensitive data since 2021. Elon Musk and SpaceX are under three federal reviews from three different US military departments for allegedly failing to comply with reporting protocols. The New York Times reported that Musk and his private aerospace company have repeatedly disregarded requirements to disclose trips and meetings with foreign leaders including Russian President Vladimir Putin. The three reviews of Musk and SpaceX’s suspected activity were opened by the Defense Department’s Office of Inspector General, the Air Force and the Pentagon’s Office of the Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security. The Air Force also reportedly denied Musk’s request for high-level security access because of concerns over potential security risks if he were allowed to handle certain pieces of classified information. https://www.yahoo.com/tech/article/elon-musk-spacex-reportedly-under-federal-review-for-undisclosed-meetings-with-foreign-leaders-213817035.html
item.dc:creator: PrinceMaxx7

item.title: The almost perfect synchronization of scenes between the remake and the original film
item.dc:creator: Diteterienare

item.title: I Lost my 17 Year Old Orange Boy Today
item.description: Thomas was enjoying the summer warmth in this picture and chillin in the patio chair. He had kidney failure. I also lost my mother over three weeks ago from stage IV cancer, can't say it's a smooth holiday season for me. But both are not suffering anymore. Hug your loved ones and furry babies this season folks, show how much you care about them. I miss mine dearly right now but I am looking forward to catching up with some good company in the next few weeks as I wasn't able to do that this year with my mother being severely ill. Cheers Imgur, you guys have helped me and keep helping me get through some sad times with your non-sense humor, take care this Holiday season ❤️ Edit: Wow, I didn't expect this to go viral honestly...damn I'm in tears but thank you all for your kind words and virtual hugs. And thank you to those for sharing pics and/or relevance of your fur babies, they are all so sweet and will be missed. For those that are about to lose your fur baby or someone dear, be with them until the very end if that's possible. I personally think it's important to have those near and dear close to make passing less scary.
item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.title: The Donut
item.description:
Took my cat Seymour to the vet yesterday as he's been excessively grooming his belly lately to the point where he's licked off a good deal of the fur in that area. I assumed some sort of environmental irritation or allergy, but my vet felt around and instead discovered this lovely intruder. It's hard, about the size of a lemon, and by all accounts appears to be hollow. My vet has taken to referring to it as the "donut" because no matter which angle they x-ray, it still shows up as round with a dark spot in the middle, implying it to be spherical/ovoid and hollow. X-rays so far have proven inconclusive to determine exactly what we're dealing with. We're pretty sure it's a fast-growing tumor, at least. Vet thinks it could be related to the spleen or a lymph node. The next step is, unfortunately, exploratory surgery to find out exactly what's going on. Of course the holidays are looming so that's going to have to wait until January. On the plus side, he has shown no adverse symptoms aside from the excessive licking. He's still eating, sleeping, playing, pooping, and doing everything else a cat is supposed to do, and he doesn't even seem phased to be touched around the area either, so he doesn't seem to be causing him any pain, either. I'm very nervous for him and hope the news in January is good, or at least not bad.
External view for cat tax. As soft as he looks, let me assure you, he's even softer.
item.dc:creator: TheCarpe

item.title: Cake Day Dump
item.description:
Long time lurker. Joined two years ago.
Started really enjoying usersub.
Sad I joined after “the good old days”.
I hear people would send you nudes if you made FP.
Alas, I now scratch out a living periodically making OC.
Sharing, but trying not to overshare.
Bummed about no Secret Santa this year.
Honestly loved watching people open gifts and see all the hobbies and interests people had.
Losing Secret Santa is another example of enshitification.
But I’ll hang here for as long as I see people punching Nazis.
And posting cute pictures of animals.
And sharing memes and being silly.
Or sharing their DIY.
Or just trying to be a human and sharing struggles.
So thanks for the cake.
Absurdist tax.
item.dc:creator: dirtyFrenchman

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1216 (sparkling gasoline)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
You guys are getting off?
The most dangerous Pokémon.
Steller's Jay in a pumpkin.
I'm so tired of this universe. This timeline. Everything is stupid. If it was possible to leave universes, I would.
Not nearly enough Dark Tower memes.
It definitely was interesting to try, but I didn't hate it.
Honestly, that's an awesome space. Needs more wall art, though.
As my friend who sent this to me said, "you identify as Arizona, don't lie."
I was thinking last night of what I'd do if I actually won an actual life-changing amount of money with a lottery. With over $80,000 of student loan debt from my ill-fated seminary experience, I'd need more than that for anything to really help with debt. I mean, I could just default on it. If we weren't looking at fascist hellscape, I'd probably stay and start a meadery. But I think now it would be escape. But I'm trapped. So it goes. I'm. I'm not sure I'm going to bother to keep working on myself anymore. Why bother?
I wish I lived in a functional country with a fully functional brain, with a less cynical soul.
If I ever raise a child who is not a bird, I will do this. I do not think this will ever happen. Especially if I really do stop working on myself.
New theory: The Doctor is a Q. The Time Lords are the Q. (I fully expect @JayDeeDubs to verbally bitchslap me in the comments why this theory is wrong and cannot be true.)
This flower, found next to the ice age mummy of a wooly rhino, was unfrozen, and sprouted. That's wild. (Well, a flower of this species depicted.)
This knife describes me.
Mood.
Pink and. Uh. If SH means "self harm," I think I'll take that one too.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Joyous fanfare noise]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Wholesome WEDNESDAY dump of smile pancakes
item.description:
1. Another good boy, must protect food man from vacuum invasion
2. You skied on the wrong trail mf
3. Corgy butt day
4. Buddies
5
6. Sunday be like
7. Gotta go fast
8. Just father and son goofing around
9
10. Those rabbits are richer than 99% of people reading this. Aghh, who am I kidding. Probably a 100%. Are rich people even on Imgur?
11. Playful boah
12. Mmmmm
13. Mmmm pt.2
14. May you have a great week : )
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The demo has 93% postivie rating and it the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
